heading: Liability in rem
label: 2106 Liability in rem
text: When a vessel is made liable in rem under this subtitle, the vessel may be libeled and proceeded against in the district court of the United States for any district in which the vessel is found.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)210646:170(14)46:216e(e)46:390d46:391a(14)(C)46:43646:46246:481(c)46:49746:526o46:672(j)46:1484(b)Section 2106 provides that when a vessel is made liable in rem the vessel may be libeled and proceeded against in a United States district court.
Amendments2006— substituted “the district court of the United States for any district” for “a district court of the United States”.Pub. L. 109–304
amendments: Amendments2006— substituted “the district court of the United States for any district” for “a district court of the United States”.Pub. L. 109–304
